steps.title: Spot the reversal
steps.content: The researchers wondered whether joro spiders spread because of aggressive behavior. The next sentence says they discovered the spiders are gentle and freeze when disturbed. The transition must signal that the finding contrasts with the expectation.

steps.title: Choose the contrast word
steps.content: Choice A signals a restatement, but the finding is not a rewording of the hypothesis. Choice B signals a result, but gentleness does not follow from wondering about aggression. Choice C signals an example, but the finding contradicts rather than illustrates aggression. The remaining transition signals an opposing discovery. The answer is D.
